notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Nathan Lukes scores. Yohendrick Piñango to 3rd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Nathan Lukes scores. Yohendrick Piñango to 3rd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ha-Seong Kim singles on a fly ball to left fielder Nathan Lukes. Eli White scores. Ha-Seong Kim to 2nd. Ha-Seong Kim advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Nathan Lukes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ha-Seong Kim singles on a fly ball to left fielder Nathan Lukes. Eli White scores. Ha-Seong Kim to 2nd. Ha-Seong Kim advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Nathan Lukes.

notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw called out on strikes.

notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski grounds into a force out, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez. Austin Riley out at 2nd. Mike Yastrzemski to 1st.
